sessionStart.description: Auto-load PROJECT_STATE.md and active agent learnings on session open

afterFileEdit.description: Auto-format, TypeScript check, console.log warning after every file edit

beforeShellExecution.description: Git push review reminder, long-running process awareness

beforeSubmitPrompt.description: Detect secrets in prompts (sk-, ghp_, AKIA, API keys) before sending

beforeReadFile.description: Warn when reading sensitive files (.env, .key, .pem, credentials)

stop.description: Auto-save session summary to PROJECT_STATE.md session log

preCompact.description: Preserve current state before context compaction
